title: refactor: extract dashboard aggregations + cross-tenant guard trait
author: augusto-dmh
summary: Three orthogonal refactors bundled into one PR: (1) extract EnsuresSameTenant trait used by multiple controllers, (2) extract DashboardAggregator service + DocumentSummaryDto from a fat DashboardController, (3) introduce a new DocumentStatus enum. v1 of the review pipeline returned zero Findings on this PR; v2 is expected to surface at least the four expected_findings recorded in expected_findings.json.
